title: OpenEXR Image
description: OpenEXR high dynamic range image data
documentation:
## Purpose
Represents an OpenEXR image, the industry-standard HDR format for visual effects and computer-generated imagery. OpenEXR supports 16-bit and 32-bit floating-point channels, multiple layers, and arbitrary channel names.

## When to use
Use `media:exr;image` when a node produces or consumes OpenEXR files, such as a 3D renderer, a compositing node, or a VFX pipeline step. For standard dynamic range images, prefer [PNG Image](https://capdag.com/browse/media:png) or [JPEG Image](https://capdag.com/browse/media:jpeg;image).

## Notes
OpenEXR files store linear light values and are not suitable for direct display without tone mapping. The format supports multi-channel data including depth, normals, and motion vectors in addition to RGB colour.
